evidence.snippet: Hitec offers a diverse line of COTS rotary and linear servo actuators featuring a wide range of performace specifications and command protocols to fulfill all of your industrial motion control needs.

Hitec Commercial Solutions delivers high-reliability servo actuators engineered for uncrewed systems operating in demanding environments. From compact sUAS to large, long-endurance platforms, Hitec supports aerospace, defense, and commercial manufacturers with scalable, non-Chinese motion control solutions designed for performance, durability, and long-term supply assurance for the global market.

items.notes: Rotary and linear servo actuators for flight surface control, landing gear, gimbals, and other UAS motion control applications.

value.address: 9320 Hazard Way Suite D, San Diego, CA 92123

evidence.snippet: *   [9320 Hazard Way Suite D, San Diego, CA 92123](https://goo.gl/maps/UMnesoit1hByeHwA9)

Our off-the-shelf and purpose-built custom servo actuators offer innovative features such as DroneCAN/CAN command protocols, magnetic encoders, brushless motors and titanium gears, delivering optimal performance for thousands of industrial and commercial applications including:

Hitec offers both **commercial off-the-shelf (COTS)** servo actuators and **customized solutions** tailored to specific airframe, payload, or environmental requirements. Our servos deliver precise motion across key uncrewed system components, including flaps, elevators, ailerons, rudders, landing gear, release mechanisms, hatches, throttles, and sensor systems (e.g., gimbals).

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells servo actuators (rotary and linear) that go into UAS/UGV platforms as motion control components.

ndaa.notes: NDAA Compliant logo displayed on both homepage and uncrewed systems page. No explicit section number cited in corpus text, but the logo claim and non-Chinese manufacturing emphasis are consistent with NDAA 848/889 compliance.

evidence.snippet: *   **Scalable production capacity** to support programs from prototype through full-rate production

readiness.notes: Catalog SKUs listed with part numbers and prices; vertically integrated factory with scalable production capacity.

unresolved_questions: NDAA compliance is inferred from logo alt text only — no explicit section 848/889 text was found in the corpus. The about-us page may contain more explicit compliance language.

fetch_requests.reason: Would confirm company details, NDAA compliance language with explicit section numbers, and additional product line information.

tagline: San Diego-based servo actuator manufacturer producing brushless rotary and linear actuators (10mm–50mm stroke) with DroneCAN/CAN protocols, magnetic encoders, and waterproofing for unmanned systems and industrial motion control. NDAA-compliant, ISO/RoHS-certified. Blue UAS status unknown. Public evidence confirms production-ready portfolio and ArduPilot partnership; no major defense primes or program contracts identified in open sources.
